series_metadata.series_description: An accurate and complete record of all information pertaining to an inmate with a Sexually Violent Predator (SVP) designation including Parole Board SVP Reviews and SVP Hearings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until a decision is made by the Parole Board to terminate control over the inmate''s service of prison term to include issuance of parole board minutes. Then retain electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 10 years after death, final release, maximum expiration or defeinite sentence., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
